text: Get ready to learn how to turn your clod code AI assistant
into a witty, sarcastic senior developer.
Discover how to personalize its personality
with features like spinner verbs, dashboard status lines,
custom sounds, session greetings, and output styles.
These tweaks add a humorous touch
giving your AI assistant the vibe of a seasoned colleague
with a flair for dry humor.
Dive into the full article for a complete guide
to setting up your own sarcastic AI coding assistant.
